calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Sep-01-2004 Continued To Sep-07-04 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Sep-07-2004 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This Cause came as reassignment from the Presiding Judge Department for Court Trial/Prove-Up.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Leticia Perez.
Michael rossoff, Esq. for Plaintiff: John Stewart Company, a California corporation.
No appearance by the Defendant: Michael Fee.
9:25 a.m.- Plaintiff's witness: Temia Graham, was sworn and direct examined.
Exhibit 1- Lease agreement ----------------------ID/EVID.
Exhibit 2- Ten day notice------------------------ID/EVID.
The Court having heard the testimony and considered the evidence, grants judgment as follows:
Judgment in favor of plaintiff and against defendants for restitution and possession of the premises located at 238 Eddy St., #422, San Francisco.
Rents and Per Diem damages $998.31
No attorney's Fees.
Costs is waived.
Lease declared forfeited.
Judgment signed in open court.
Counsel stipulated for return of exhibits.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Sep-07-2004 Assigned To Trial Court

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-01-2004 Off Calendar
